title: Error Response
description: Standardized error response format for all MCP servers in the National MCP-PAI Oncology Trials network. Derived from servers/common/__init__.py error_response() helper. All conforming servers MUST use this format for error responses.

code.description: Machine-readable error code from the standard taxonomy.

message.description: Human-readable error description. MUST NOT contain PHI, patient identifiers, or internal system details.

server.description: MCP server that generated the error.

tool.description: MCP tool that was invoked when the error occurred.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the error.

request_id.description: Correlation ID for tracing this request across the system.

details.description: Additional error context. MUST NOT contain PHI.

field.description: The input field that caused the error (for VALIDATION_FAILED / INVALID_INPUT).

retry_after_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before retrying (for RATE_LIMITED).

examples.message: Resource ID contains prohibited URL pattern
Access denied: no matching ALLOW rule for the requested operation
Request rate exceeded; retry after the specified interval
